infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The app needs camera access to take vehicle photos and scan QR codes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The app needs photo library access to upload vehicle images.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: The app needs microphone access for camera use.

plugins.cameraPermission: The app needs camera access to take vehicle photos and scan QR codes.

plugins.photosPermission: The app needs access to your photos to let you upload vehicle images.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app needs access to your camera to let you take vehicle images.
